mapper.select: SELECT * FROM platform_accounts WHERE role = #{role} AND status = '启用' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM platform_accounts WHERE client_id = #{clientId} AND status = '启用' ORDER BY full_name

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '启用' THEN 1 END) as active_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '停用' THEN 1 END) as inactive_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN account_type = 'admin' THEN 1 END) as admin_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN account_type = 'operator' THEN 1 END) as operator_count FROM platform_accounts WHERE 1=1
AND client_id = #{clientId}
